caption: A man with a shaved head and a full beard sits in a recording studio, wearing black over-ear headphones and a white t-shirt with the text "Stay Und" printed on the chest. He is positioned in front of a professional silver condenser microphone held by a black shock mount and boom arm. The background consists of dark gray acoustic foam panels with a ribbed texture. Across the sequence, the man is speaking, and his facial expressions shift slightly as he talks. In the initial moments, he looks forward with a neutral expression, then opens his mouth to speak, momentarily glancing toward the side before returning his gaze forward with a more pronounced open-mouthed expression. The lighting remains consistent throughout, and the camera angle is a static medium close-up focusing on the man and his recording equipment.
